revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-1-085

Alternative term: Groin

A structure extending into the sea from a beach or bank, designed to prevent littoral drift.


Note: The French term epi and the German term Buhne are also used for structures extending into rivers or estuaries, designed to restrict the cross-sectional area of the water flow.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Groyne}}
